query:
You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.50 (commit: 2c163c68).

## Issue to Resolve

Nullpointer exception for if-else statement having an empty THEN block
I made a typo in a multiline if else statement.  While technically valid Kotlin code, it causes Ktlint to crash.

## Expected Behavior
I don't know exactly how Ktlint should behave here with regards to formatting, but it probably shouldn't crash.

## Observed Behavior
```
Internal Error (rule 'standard:multiline-if-else') in Test.kt at position '0:0. Please create a ticket at https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues and provide the source code that triggered an error.
com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.api.KtLintRuleException: Rule 'standard:multiline-if-else' throws exception in file 'PrepareGoogle.kt' at position (0:0)
   Rule maintainer: KtLint
   Issue tracker  : https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues
   Repository     : https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRule(RuleExecutionContext.kt:65)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.api.KtLintRuleEngine$format$3.invoke(KtLintRuleEngine.kt:154)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.api.KtLintRuleEngine$format$3.invoke(KtLintRuleEngine.kt:153)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.VisitorProvider$visitor$3.invoke(VisitorProvider.kt:46)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.VisitorProvider$visitor$3.invoke(VisitorProvider.kt:44)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.api.KtLintRuleEngine.format(KtLintRuleEngine.kt:153)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.cli.internal.KtlintCommandLine.format(KtlintCommandLine.kt:485)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.cli.internal.KtlintCommandLine.process(KtlintCommandLine.kt:471)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.cli.internal.KtlintCommandLine.access$process(KtlintCommandLine.kt:61)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.cli.internal.KtlintCommandLine$lintFiles$3.invoke$lambda$0(KtlintCommandLine.kt:411)
	at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264)
	at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136)
	at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635)
	at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:833)
Caused by: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode.getElementType()" because the return value of "org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode.getFirstChildNode()" is null
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules.MultiLineIfElseRule.beforeVisitChildNodes(MultiLineIfElseRule.kt:98)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:125)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:124)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.SuppressHandler.handle(SuppressHandler.kt:28)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:124)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:93)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.access$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:30)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:132)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.SuppressHandler.handle(SuppressHandler.kt:28)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:93)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.access$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:30)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:132)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.SuppressHandler.handle(SuppressHandler.kt:28)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:93)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.access$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:30)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:132)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.SuppressHandler.handle(SuppressHandler.kt:28)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:93)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.access$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:30)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:132)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.SuppressHandler.handle(SuppressHandler.kt:28)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:93)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.access$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:30)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:132)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.SuppressHandler.handle(SuppressHandler.kt:28)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:93)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.access$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:30)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:132)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively$2$1.invoke(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.SuppressHandler.handle(SuppressHandler.kt:28)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:131)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:93)
	at com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.internal.RuleExecutionContext.access$executeRuleOnNodeRecursively(RuleExecutionContext.kt:30)
```


## Steps to Reproduce
```
    if ("a" == "b") {
    } else if ("b" == "c") else {
    }
```

## Your Environment
<!--- Include as many relevant details about the environment you experienced the bug in -->
* Version of ktlint used: 0.50.0
* Relevant parts of the `.editorconfig` settings
* Name and version (or code for custom task) of integration used (Gradle plugin, Maven plugin, command line, custom Gradle task): Custom Gradle task
* Version of Gradle used (if applicable): 8.2.1
* Operating System and version: macOS

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

>```
>     if ("a" == "b") {
>     } else if ("b" == "c") else {
>     }
>```

Kotlin keeps amazing me. I would never have expected that this was valid Kotlin code. Tnx for reporting the bug.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/IfElseBracingRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.rules
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.BINARY_EXPRESSION
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.BLOCK
  5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION
  6→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE
  7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.ELSE_KEYWORD
  8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.IF
  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.LBRACE
 10→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RBRACE
 11→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RPAR
 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.THEN
 13→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.IndentConfig
 14→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.RuleId
 15→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.EditorConfig
 16→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY
 17→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.editorconfig.INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY
 18→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.indent
 19→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isPartOfComment
 20→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpace
 21→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline
 22→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.nextSibling
 23→import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 24→import com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard.StandardRule
 25→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 28→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 29→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 30→
 31→/**
 32→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 33→ */
 34→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ) {
 43→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 44→
 45→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 46→        indentConfig =
 47→            IndentConfig(
 48→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 49→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 50→            )
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 54→        node: ASTNode,
 55→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 56→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 57→    ) {
 58→        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59→            return
 60→        }
 61→
 62→        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63→        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→
 67→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70→        ) {
 71→            // Allow
 72→            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73→            //     "bar1"
 74→            // } else if (bar2) {
 75→            //     null
 76→            // } else {
 77→            //     null
 78→            // } ?: "something-else"
 79→            return
 80→        }
 81→
 82→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 83→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 84→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85→        ) {
 86→            // Allow
 87→            // val foo = if (bar1) {
 88→            //     "bar1"
 89→            // } else if (bar2) {
 90→            //     "bar2"
 91→            // } else {
 92→            //     "bar3"
 93→            // }.plus("foo")
 94→            return
 95→        }
 96→
 97→        if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 98→            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99→                // Allow single line for:
100→                // else if (...)
101→                return
102→            }
103→            if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
104→                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
105→                //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
106→                //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
107→                return
108→            }
109→
110→            Unit
111→        }
112→
113→        emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
114→        if (autoCorrect) {
115→            autocorrect(node)
116→        }
117→    }
118→
119→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
120→        val prevLeaves =
121→            node
122→                .leaves(forward = false)
123→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
124→                .toList()
125→                .reversed()
126→        val nextLeaves =
127→            node
128→                .leaves(forward = true)
129→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
130→                .toList()
131→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
132→
133→        prevLeaves
134→            .firstOrNull()
135→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
136→            ?.let {
137→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
138→            }
139→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
140→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
141→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
142→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
143→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
144→            prevLeaves
145→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
146→                .forEach(::addChild)
147→            addChild(previousChild)
148→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
149→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
150→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
151→        }
152→
153→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
154→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
155→            node
156→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
157→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
158→        }
159→    }
160→}
161→
162→public val MULTI_LINE_IF_ELSE_RULE_ID: RuleId = MultiLineIfElseRule().ruleId
163→

content.thinking:
**Adding null guard for firstChildNode**

Noticed null firstChildNode causes NPE on malformed else-if; decided to add a safe check to handle empty THEN/ELSE branches gracefully and prevent crashes while considering if missing block detection is still needed.**Choosing minimal null-guard fix**

Decided to return early if firstChildNode is null to prevent crashes, accepting no lint emission for missing blocks since handling that would be more complex; planning a minimal fix by safely assigning firstChild before use.

Summary:
- Added a null-guard for `node.firstChildNode` and routed subsequent checks through the non-null `firstChildNode` to prevent the NPE when a THEN/ELSE node has no child.

Tests: Not run (not requested).

 57→    ) {
 58→        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59→            return
 60→        }
 61→
 62→        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63→        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→
 67→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70→        ) {
 71→            // Allow
 72→            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73→            //     "bar1"
 74→            // } else if (bar2) {
 75→            //     null
 76→            // } else {
 77→            //     null
 78→            // } ?: "something-else"
 79→            return
 80→        }
 81→
 82→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 83→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 84→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85→        ) {
 86→            // Allow
 87→            // val foo = if (bar1) {
 88→            //     "bar1"
 89→            // } else if (bar2) {
 90→            //     "bar2"
 91→            // } else {
 92→            //     "bar3"
 93→            // }.plus("foo")
 94→            return
 95→        }
 96→
 97→        if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 98→            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99→                // Allow single line for:
100→                // else if (...)
101→                return
102→            }
103→            if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
104→                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
105→                //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
106→                //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
107→                return
108→            }
109→
110→            Unit
111→        }
112→
113→        emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
114→        if (autoCorrect) {
115→            autocorrect(node)
116→        }
117→    }
118→
119→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
120→        val prevLeaves =
121→            node
122→                .leaves(forward = false)
123→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
124→                .toList()
125→                .reversed()
126→        val nextLeaves =
127→            node
128→                .leaves(forward = true)
129→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
130→                .toList()
131→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
132→
133→        prevLeaves
134→            .firstOrNull()
135→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
136→            ?.let {
137→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
138→            }
139→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
140→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
141→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
142→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
143→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
144→            prevLeaves
145→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
146→                .forEach(::addChild)
147→            addChild(previousChild)
148→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
149→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
150→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
151→        }
152→
153→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
154→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
155→            node
156→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
157→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
158→        }
159→    }
160→}
161→
162→public val MULTI_LINE_IF_ELSE_RULE_ID: RuleId = MultiLineIfElseRule().ruleId
163→
